description:
A team of space builders travels across distant worlds to recover the fragments of the Master Core, a legendary artifact that grants the power to create anything through cooperation alone. After overcoming dangerous environmental challenges and stopping the selfish Crank from carrying out his plans, the group restores harmony across the universe, proving that teamwork is the most powerful building tool in the galaxy.

One hundred percent child safe: a secure and closed experience on Nintendo Switch™ with no adverts, no microtransactions and no hidden fees.

An interactive fairytale experience. A perfect linear narrative adventure for young readers to enjoy a captivating story at their own pace.
